product_overview: iWorkr is a field service management backend surface exposing workspace, team, compliance, billing, scheduling, automation and integration APIs to support the iWorkr web and desktop clients. This PRD covers core backend features and concrete API usage flows for happy and error paths.
core_goals: Provide secure cookie-based session authentication and workspace/context switching for multi-workspace users.
Support team onboarding flows (invite, validate, signup, accept) and password management with clear success and error responses.
Offer compliance, finance, and document endpoints (dossiers, invoice PDFs, public access) with correct auth handling.
Expose scheduling validation, notifications device registration, automation execution, and cron endpoints for operations.
Integrate billing (Stripe Connect & Billing) and external webhooks/OAuth flows with appropriate unauthenticated handlers where required.
Deliver clear, testable API flows (happy + error) so frontends and integrations can implement deterministic behavior.

features.name: Authentication & Context Switching
features.description: Switch and query the active workspace/branch for a logged-in user using cookie-based session auth.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/switch-context with valid session cookie and body {workspaceId, branchId?} -> Receive 200 {ok: true, workspace: {id, name, slug, role}}
GET /api/auth/switch-context with valid session cookie -> Receive 200 {workspaceId, branchId}
POST /api/auth/switch-context without session cookie -> Receive 401 Not authenticated
GET /api/auth/switch-context with expired/invalid cookie -> Receive 401 Not authenticated

features.name: Team Management (Invites & Passwords)
features.description: Invite team members, validate invite tokens, create accounts from invites, accept invites as existing users, and allow admins to set passwords.
user_flows: POST /api/team/invite with valid admin session cookie and body {email, role} -> Receive 200 {success, invite_id, email, role} -> POST /api/team/validate-invite with body {token} -> Receive 200 {valid: true, email, role, organization_id} -> POST /api/team/signup-invite with body {token, email, password} -> Receive 200 {success, user_id}
POST /api/team/invite without session cookie -> Receive 401 Not authenticated
POST /api/team/validate-invite with invalid/expired token -> Receive 200 {valid: false, message} (or appropriate 4xx)
POST /api/team/signup-invite with short password -> Receive 400 Missing fields, short password
POST /api/team/accept-invite with existing user and valid session cookie -> Receive 200 {success, organization_id}

POST /api/team/set-password with admin session cookie and body {userId, password} -> Receive 200 {success, email} -> POST /api/team/set-password without admin privileges -> Receive 401 Not authenticated

features.name: User Organization
features.description: Retrieve the current user's organization id to scope operations and UI.
user_flows: GET /api/user/organization with valid session cookie -> Receive 200 {organization_id}
GET /api/user/organization without session cookie -> Receive 401 Not authenticated

features.name: Compliance & Verification
features.description: Verify uploaded documents by SHA256, generate compliance dossier and policy PDFs, and provide auditor vault access.
user_flows: POST /api/compliance/verify as multipart/form-data with file field and no session (public) -> Receive 200 {authentic, sha256_hash, record, message}
POST /api/compliance/verify with no file -> Receive 400 No file provided
GET /api/compliance/dossier with valid session cookie -> Receive 200 application/pdf (dossier PDF)
GET /api/compliance/dossier without session cookie -> Receive 401 Not authenticated
POST /api/compliance/vault with body {token, passcode, mode} -> Receive 200 Vault data
POST /api/compliance/vault with invalid token -> Receive 404 Portal not found
GET /api/compliance/policies/dossier with valid session cookie -> Receive 200 application/pdf
GET /api/compliance/policies/dossier without session cookie -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Invoices (PDF generation & public access)
features.description: Generate invoice PDFs for authenticated users and expose public invoice data via public URLs.
user_flows: POST /api/invoices/generate-pdf with valid session cookie and body {invoiceId} -> Receive 200 application/pdf or {url} pointing to PDF
POST /api/invoices/generate-pdf with valid session cookie and non-existent invoiceId -> Receive 404 Invoice not found
POST /api/invoices/generate-pdf without session cookie -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /api/invoices/public/{invoiceId} without auth -> Receive 200 Invoice JSON
GET /api/invoices/public/{invoiceId} for missing invoiceId -> Receive 404 Not found

features.name: Quotes (Accept / Decline via token)
features.description: Allow external recipients to accept or decline quotes using tokenized endpoints (no session required).
user_flows: POST /api/quotes/{id}/accept with body {token} -> Receive 200 {message, quote_id}
POST /api/quotes/{id}/accept with missing/invalid token -> Receive 401 Missing token
POST /api/quotes/{id}/decline with body {token} -> Receive 200 {message, quote_id}
POST /api/quotes/{id}/decline with missing/invalid token -> Receive 401 Missing token

features.name: Schedule Validation
features.description: Validate schedule blocks for conflicts, travel calculation, and warnings when creating or editing schedule entries.
user_flows: POST /api/schedule/validate with valid session cookie and body {organization_id, technician_id, start_time, end_time} -> Receive 200 {valid, conflicts, travel, warnings}
POST /api/schedule/validate with overlapping block causing conflicts -> Receive 200 {valid: false, conflicts: [...]}
POST /api/schedule/validate without session cookie -> Receive 401 Not authenticated

features.name: Notifications (Device Registration)
features.description: Register push notification devices (FCM tokens) for authenticated users so the system can deliver push notifications.
user_flows: POST /api/notifications/register-device with valid session cookie and body {fcm_token, device_type} -> Receive 200 {success: true}
POST /api/notifications/register-device with invalid or missing token -> Receive 401 Not authenticated

features.name: Automation Engine (Cron & Execute)
features.description: Run scheduled cron jobs and trigger automation flows via secured endpoints.
user_flows: GET /api/automation/cron with valid secret header (and auth if required) -> Receive 200 {success, processed_at}
GET /api/automation/cron with invalid secret -> Receive 401 Invalid secret
POST /api/automation/execute with valid secret header and body {payload} -> Receive 200 {success, flows_matched}
POST /api/automation/execute with invalid/absent secret -> Receive 401 Invalid secret

features.name: Stripe Billing & Connect
features.description: Expose Stripe onboarding, subscription creation/management, portal access, payment intents, Terminal tokens and webhook handling for billing workflows.
user_flows: POST /api/stripe/create-subscription with valid session cookie and body {planId, customerId} -> Receive 200 {subscription_id, status}
POST /api/stripe/create-subscription without session cookie -> Receive 401 Not authenticated
POST /api/stripe/portal with valid session cookie -> Receive 200 {url} (billing portal URL)
POST /api/stripe/connect/onboard with valid session cookie and body {accountDetails} -> Receive 200 {onboarding_url}
POST /api/stripe/connect/terminal-token with valid session cookie -> Receive 200 {client_secret} (terminal connection token)
POST /api/stripe/webhook (public) with Stripe event payload -> Receive 200 acknowledged event handling
POST /api/stripe/webhook with malformed payload or invalid signature -> Receive 4xx error indicating verification failure

features.name: Webhooks (External handlers)
features.description: Receive and process external webhooks from GoHighLevel, Google Calendar, and legacy Polar webhook endpoint.
user_flows: POST /api/webhooks/gohighlevel with valid webhook body -> Receive 200 acknowledged
POST /api/webhooks/google-calendar with event payload -> Receive 200 acknowledged
POST /api/webhook/polar with legacy payload -> Receive 200 acknowledged (deprecated path)
POST /api/webhooks/gohighlevel with missing required fields -> Receive 400 Bad Request

features.name: Admin & Utilities
features.description: Admin helpers such as end impersonation, cache revalidation, telemetry export, desktop version info and legacy redirect helpers.
user_flows: POST /api/admin/end-impersonation (public endpoint expected to clear session state) -> Receive 200 success
POST /api/revalidate with body {path} -> Receive 200 cache revalidated
GET /api/telemetry/export with valid admin session cookie -> Receive 200 telemetry CSV
GET /api/desktop/version -> Receive 200 {version, channel}
GET /api/telemetry/export without auth -> Receive 401 Not authenticated

features.name: Integrations (OAuth & Sync Monitoring)
features.description: Handle OAuth callbacks and surface integration sync status to the UI.
user_flows: GET /api/integrations/callback with query {code, state} -> Receive 200 success and proceed with token exchange
GET /api/integrations/callback without code -> Receive 400 Bad Request
GET /api/integrations/sync-radar with valid session cookie -> Receive 200 {sync_status, last_synced}
GET /api/integrations/sync-radar without session cookie -> Receive 401 Not authenticated

features.name: Care Module (Plan Reviews & Cleaning Logs)
features.description: Provide PDF previews for plan reviews and facility cleaning logs for authenticated users.
user_flows: GET /api/care/plan-reviews/preview with valid session cookie and query {planId} -> Receive 200 application/pdf
GET /api/care/facilities/{facilityId}/cleaning-log with valid session cookie -> Receive 200 application/pdf
GET /api/care/plan-reviews/preview without session cookie -> Receive 401 Not authenticated

features.name: Client Statements
features.description: Generate client statement PDFs for a given client id for authenticated users.
user_flows: GET /api/clients/{id}/statement with valid session cookie -> Receive 200 application/pdf
GET /api/clients/{id}/statement with missing/invalid session cookie -> Receive 401 Not authenticated
GET /api/clients/{id}/statement for non-existent clientId -> Receive 404 Not found

known_limitations.issue: Cookie-based auth may be blocked by TestSprite proxy (407)
Compliance verify now properly returns 400 for missing file (FIXED)
Compliance policies dossier now properly returns 401 (FIXED)
Invoice generate-pdf now checks auth before lookup (FIXED)
